name: classify_signal
promptSpec:
Process classify_signal(level, threshold) -> (status, action)

FSF specification:
if (level lt 0) => status eq 2 && action eq 3
if (level ge 0 && threshold lt 0) => status eq 1 && action eq 2
if (level ge 0 && threshold ge 0) => status eq 0 && action eq 1
others => status eq 0 && action eq 0

name: borrow
promptSpec:
Process borrow(member_id, book_id) -> (success)

FSF specification:
if (member_id gt 0 && book_id gt 0) => success eq 1
if (member_id le 0) => success eq 0
others => success eq 0

name: reserve
promptSpec:
Process reserve(member_id, book_id) -> (queued)

FSF specification:
if (book_id gt 0 && member_id gt 0) => queued eq 1
if (book_id le 0) => queued eq 0
others => queued eq 0

name: reorder_stock
promptSpec:
Process reorder_stock(stock, demand, lead_days) -> (order_qty, urgent)

FSF specification:
if (stock le 0 && demand gt 0) => order_qty eq 100 && urgent eq 1
if (stock le 10 && demand ge 20) => order_qty eq 50 && urgent eq 1
if (stock le 30 && lead_days le 2) => order_qty eq 30 && urgent eq 0
if (stock gt 30) => order_qty eq 0 && urgent eq 0
others => order_qty eq 0 && urgent eq 0

name: approve_loan

fsfScenarios.test: score ge 750 && income gt 50 && debt le 30

promptSpec:
Process approve_loan(score, income, debt) -> (approved, limit)

FSF specification:
if (score lt 600) => approved eq 0 && limit eq 0
if (score ge 750 && income gt 50 && debt le 30) => approved eq 1 && limit eq 100
if (score ge 650 && income gt 30) => approved eq 1 && limit eq 50
if (score ge 600) => approved eq 0 && limit eq 0
others => approved eq 0 && limit eq 0

name: route_ticket
promptSpec:
Process route_ticket(priority, category, vip) -> (queue, escalate)

FSF specification:
if (vip eq 1) => queue eq 0 && escalate eq 1
if (priority ge 8 && category le 2) => queue eq 1 && escalate eq 1
if (priority ge 5) => queue eq 2 && escalate eq 0
if (priority lt 5) => queue eq 3 && escalate eq 0
others => queue eq 0 && escalate eq 0

name: screen_payment
promptSpec:
Process screen_payment(amount, velocity, country) -> (block, review)

FSF specification:
if (country ge 5) => block eq 1 && review eq 0
if (amount gt 500 && velocity gt 10) => block eq 1 && review eq 0
if (amount gt 200 && velocity gt 5) => block eq 0 && review eq 1
if (amount le 200) => block eq 0 && review eq 0
others => block eq 0 && review eq 0

name: check_access

fsfScenarios.test: clearance ge 2 && role ge 2 && resource le 2

promptSpec:
Process check_access(role, clearance, resource) -> (allowed, audit)

FSF specification:
if (clearance ge 3 && role ge 3) => allowed eq 1 && audit eq 1
if (clearance ge 2 && role ge 2 && resource le 2) => allowed eq 1 && audit eq 0
if (role ge 1 && resource eq 1) => allowed eq 1 && audit eq 0
if (role le 0) => allowed eq 0 && audit eq 1
others => allowed eq 0 && audit eq 0

name: calc_shipping
promptSpec:
Process calc_shipping(weight, distance, express) -> (cost, eta)

FSF specification:
if (express eq 1 && weight gt 20) => cost eq 50 && eta eq 1
if (express eq 1) => cost eq 30 && eta eq 1
if (weight gt 50 && distance gt 100) => cost eq 40 && eta eq 5
if (weight gt 20) => cost eq 20 && eta eq 3
others => cost eq 0 && eta eq 0

name: assign_grade
promptSpec:
Process assign_grade(score, bonus, late) -> (grade, points)

FSF specification:
if (late eq 1) => grade eq 0 && points eq 0
if (score ge 90 && bonus ge 5) => grade eq 4 && points eq 100
if (score ge 80) => grade eq 3 && points eq 80
if (score ge 60) => grade eq 2 && points eq 60
others => grade eq 0 && points eq 0

name: dispatch_power

fsfScenarios.test: load eq 0 && solar gt 0 && battery lt 90

promptSpec:
Process dispatch_power(load, solar, battery) -> (source, charge)

FSF specification:
if (load eq 0 && solar gt 0 && battery lt 90) => source eq 2 && charge eq 1
if (load gt 0 && solar ge load) => source eq 2 && charge eq 0
if (load gt 0 && battery ge 20) => source eq 3 && charge eq 0
if (load gt 0) => source eq 1 && charge eq 0
others => source eq 0 && charge eq 0

name: evict_cache
promptSpec:
Process evict_cache(hits, size, ttl) -> (evict, refresh)

FSF specification:
if (ttl le 0) => evict eq 1 && refresh eq 0
if (hits ge 100 && size le 10) => evict eq 0 && refresh eq 1
if (hits ge 50 && ttl le 60) => evict eq 0 && refresh eq 1
if (size gt 50) => evict eq 1 && refresh eq 0
others => evict eq 0 && refresh eq 0

name: throttle_request
promptSpec:
Process throttle_request(rate, burst, priority) -> (allow, delay)

FSF specification:
if (priority ge 9) => allow eq 1 && delay eq 0
if (rate gt 1000 && burst gt 50) => allow eq 0 && delay eq 0
if (rate gt 500 && priority ge 5) => allow eq 1 && delay eq 100
if (rate gt 500) => allow eq 0 && delay eq 200
others => allow eq 0 && delay eq 0

name: calc_dose
promptSpec:
Process calc_dose(weight, age, severity) -> (dose, warn)

FSF specification:
if (severity ge 3 && age lt 12) => dose eq 0 && warn eq 2
if (age lt 12 && weight lt 20) => dose eq 1 && warn eq 1
if (age ge 75 && severity ge 2) => dose eq 2 && warn eq 1
if (weight ge 70) => dose eq 3 && warn eq 0
others => dose eq 0 && warn eq 0

name: check_enrollment
promptSpec:
Process check_enrollment(credits, gpa, status) -> (eligible, units)

FSF specification:
if (status eq 0) => eligible eq 0 && units eq 0
if (credits ge 90 && gpa ge 35) => eligible eq 1 && units eq 18
if (credits ge 60 && gpa ge 30) => eligible eq 1 && units eq 15
if (gpa lt 20) => eligible eq 0 && units eq 0
others => eligible eq 0 && units eq 0

name: escalate_alarm

fsfScenarios.test: level ge 3 && ack eq 0 && duration gt 60

promptSpec:
Process escalate_alarm(level, ack, duration) -> (tier, notify)

FSF specification:
if (level ge 3 && ack eq 0 && duration gt 60) => tier eq 3 && notify eq 2
if (level ge 2 && ack eq 0) => tier eq 2 && notify eq 1
if (level ge 1 && ack eq 1) => tier eq 1 && notify eq 0
if (level eq 0) => tier eq 0 && notify eq 0
others => tier eq 0 && notify eq 0

name: allocate_stock
promptSpec:
Process allocate_stock(on_hand, reserved, incoming) -> (alloc, backorder)

FSF specification:
if (on_hand ge reserved) => alloc eq reserved && backorder eq 0
if (on_hand lt reserved && incoming gt 0) => alloc eq on_hand && backorder eq 1
if (on_hand lt reserved) => alloc eq on_hand && backorder eq 1
others => alloc eq 0 && backorder eq 0

name: calc_premium
promptSpec:
Process calc_premium(age, risk, claims) -> (premium, tier)

FSF specification:
if (claims ge 5) => premium eq 0 && tier eq 0
if (age lt 25 && risk ge 3) => premium eq 80 && tier eq 3
if (age ge 65 && risk ge 2) => premium eq 60 && tier eq 3
if (risk ge 2) => premium eq 40 && tier eq 2
others => premium eq 0 && tier eq 0

name: set_signal
promptSpec:
Process set_signal(queue, emergency, cycle) -> (green, yellow)

FSF specification:
if (emergency eq 1) => green eq 1 && yellow eq 0
if (queue gt 5 && cycle ge 30) => green eq 1 && yellow eq 0
if (queue le 5 && cycle lt 30) => green eq 0 && yellow eq 1
others => green eq 0 && yellow eq 0

name: calc_bonus
promptSpec:
Process calc_bonus(base, years, perf) -> (bonus, raise)

FSF specification:
if (perf ge 5 && years ge 5) => bonus eq 20 && raise eq 10
if (perf ge 5) => bonus eq 15 && raise eq 5
if (perf ge 3 && years ge 10) => bonus eq 10 && raise eq 8
if (years ge 15) => bonus eq 8 && raise eq 5
others => bonus eq 0 && raise eq 0

name: route_packet
promptSpec:
Process route_packet(protocol, port, priority) -> (route, queue)

FSF specification:
if (protocol eq 0) => route eq 0 && queue eq 0
if (priority ge 8 && protocol eq 1) => route eq 1 && queue eq 0
if (protocol eq 1 && port le 1024) => route eq 2 && queue eq 1
if (port gt 1024) => route eq 3 && queue eq 2
others => route eq 0 && queue eq 0

name: control_tank
promptSpec:
Process control_tank(level, inflow, outflow) -> (pump, valve)

FSF specification:
if (level gt 90) => pump eq 0 && valve eq 1
if (level gt 70 && level le 90) => pump eq 0 && valve eq 1
if (level lt 30 && inflow gt 0) => pump eq 1 && valve eq 0
if (level ge 30 && level le 70) => pump eq 0 && valve eq 0
others => pump eq 0 && valve eq 0
